title: microgramma crispata
intro: Microgramma crispata, also known as the Palmate Shield Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microgramma crispata include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and promoting skin health. Microgramma crispata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
